message: PDF parser title lookahead needed to handle 2026-03 C++ level 4 programming problem 2 where previous reference code appears before the next title in PDF text order.
OJ title normalization now strips leading OJ IDs such as P15798 so zqiceberg links can attach to the same canonical problem as Luogu entries.
Canonical alignment produced 216 C++ canonical problems, 18 secondary source versions, 44 duplicate candidates and 1 conflict candidate.
